conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions.
org_constraint: Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone.
new_constraint: Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
instruction: Compose an email to an art gallery asking about upcoming exhibitions. Tailor the email for a professional audience, avoiding jargon and maintaining a polite and formal tone. Use the phrase "artistic vibes and funky aesthetics" exactly once in the email.
response:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Upcoming Exhibitions

Dear [Gallery Name] Team,

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my keen interest in the exhibitions currently scheduled or planned for the near future at your gallery. I have long admired [mention something specific you admire about the gallery, e.g., your commitment to contemporary artists, the curation of your space, etc.], and I am eager to learn more about what you have coming up.

Could you please direct me to a schedule or provide information regarding any upcoming shows? I am particularly interested in seeing what kind of artistic vibes and funky aesthetics your current programming features.

Thank you very much for your time and assistance. I look forward to hearing from you and hopefully visiting the gallery soon.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title/Affiliation, if applicable]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your Email Address]<turn|>
